using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

using System.Linq;

    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Keyed, global::TestNamespace.Keyed>("Key");
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>("Key", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.Keyed>(key));
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedEnum, global::TestNamespace.KeyedEnum>(global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum.Key0);
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum.Key0, (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.KeyedEnum>(key));
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedCsharp, global::TestNamespace.KeyedCsharp>(global::TestNamespace.KeyedExtensions.Key);
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(global::TestNamespace.KeyedExtensions.Key, (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.KeyedCsharp>(key));
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.StringConsumer>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                {
                    var p0 = new global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<string, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(default, sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>());
                    var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.StringConsumer(p0);
                    return s0;
                });
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.EnumConsumer>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                {
                    var p0 = new global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(default, sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>());
                    var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.EnumConsumer(p0);
                    return s0;
                });

                // KeyValuePair registrations for keyed services
                services.Add(new global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor(typeof(global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<string, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>), (global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => (object)new global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<string, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>("Key", sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>("Key")), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime.Singleton));
                services.Add(new global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptor(typeof(global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>), (global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => (object)new global::System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair<global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum, global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum.Key0, sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IKeyed>(global::TestNamespace.KeyEnum.Key0)), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime.Singleton));
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
